messages.content:
these repost accounts suck
no credit to the artist
no source sharing
Work in progress, soon i'll make it play media

Performance...
Using something other(wf-recorder/kooha/simple screem recorder ) will be much better unless you have a really powerful hardware(which supports hardware encoding) ... But I guess now people just have that extra powerful hardware around ...

yeah true
but obs has gotten a bit lighter than it was prior, i mainly use obs rn cuz it has good noise suppression for mic. but for the sake of recording and sending yeah another lightweight would be better
if you have a gpu then it doesnt even matter what you use
obs works just fine its lightweight too
people who hard powerful hardware dont notice
obs is good, it got many settings
I think you again forgot what i said ... Obs "just for screen recording " is not good
Yeah well i use wf-recorder only when I have to record a specific section on my screen, using obs is heavy I agree
Doesn't makes sense but your choice
Man mb I just used OBS for recording cuz I wanted to 😭 using obs didn't destroyed my laptop

Wf recorder has audio and video both supported with filters as well you can make aliases or some script you forget commands easily .... And i don't think encoding quality is worse than obs and also you can and will re encode the video explicitly even if you want good encoding 


If you have troubles like washed out colours or something you can use filters like i do too just adjust gamma , contrast , sat, etc

If you want to record for video or something then most people actually do audio seperately anyways ... And both are the same bro they use the same things for recording (pipewire) kooha uses gstreamer i think ... If you want a simple gui you can check that out too ... But unless you are following some complex workflow ... Obs is a overkill

my guy..... I agree obs is overkill but it got the work done without any problem, it just an game's screen recording which obs did perfectly fine, I used obs cuz I wanted to, I use wf recorder when I want to record an selected area.. obs did my work, no problem occured, and my laptop is fine as it was before recording, I dont really see a point in arguing over this. And I think for more comments should move to #off-topic or #main-ware as its media channel btw
I was going to make some comment on how lappy's health and how it will be happy if you switch but ok ... I will leave this topic now .your choice
